## Description
Please describe the changes in this pull request, detailing what they accomplish and why they are necessary.

## Affected Components
- [ ] `apps/web` (Next.js Frontend)
- [ ] `apps/api` (NestJS Backend)
- [ ] `packages/database` (DB Schemas/Supabase migrations)
- [ ] `packages/types` (Shared Type Definitions)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] All linting and TypeScript checks pass locally.
